rulings.Case Title: VINOD KRIPALANI et al VS. PAUL MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why Judgment Debtors Paul Martin And Sharon Yost, Jointly And Severally, Should Not Be Held In Contempt
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 24, 2014, line 2. Order To Show Cause Why Judgment Debtors Paul Martin And Sharon Yost, Jointly And Severally, Should Not Be Held In Contempt CONTINUED to March 6, 2014. Defendants to produce by 4 p.m. on February 27, 2014 photographs of relevant portions of property showing location of retaining wall, location of curb wall that needs to be moved, Google map of property with location of retaining wall and curb wall marked, and all other exhibits referenced but not attached to Defendants' Response to Motion for Contempt.= (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: EUGENE KIM, VS. TROPHY PROPERTIES XIV DE, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Moiton For Approval Of Distribution Of Class Benefit Funds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 24, 2014, line 3. PLAINTIFF EUGENE KIM's Motion For Approval Of Distribution Of Class Benefit Funds Hearing required on Plaintiff's Motion for Approval of Distribution of Class Benefit Funds. Class representative to provide additional candidates for cy pres award who are more closely related to the assistance of low-income tenants or vindication of tenant rights. Counsel should also provide Court at the hearing with full information regarding what amount counsel has collected in attorney's fees and costs and what additional amount counsel is seeking. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: GABRIELA GEYER et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Gabriela Geyer And Travis Geyer'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 24, 2014, line 8. Plaintiffs Gabriela Geyer And Travis Geyer'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Sanctions With respect to Plaintiffs' Motion to Compel Meridian Management's Discovery Responses, the Court rules as follows: Defendants are to produce each variation of the standard lease packets utilized in its buildings. Defendants are to amend its discovery responses to reflect the total number of tenants it has in response to production request number 9. Meridian also to produce in response to request 15, the signed acknowledgment of receipt of § 1940.8 notices for 305 Hyde Street and two other buildings that it manages in San Francisco. Meridian to provide list of buildings it manages to Plaintiffs and Plaintiffs to select the buildings. The Court adopts the balance of the recommendations made by the Judge Pro Tem. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: GABRIELA GEYER et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 24, 2014, line 8. Defendant Meridian Management Group'S Motion For Protective Order DENIED since scope of production is limited. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: LONE OAK FUND, LLC VS. INNOCENTI, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order 1) Approving And Settling Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting; 2) Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs For Receiver; 3) Exonerating All Bonds; 4) Approving And Ratifying All Of Receiver'S Acts And Transactions; 5) Retaining Jurisdiction Re This Receivership;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 24, 2014, line 9. OTHER KEVIN SINGER's Motion For Order 1) Approving And Settling Receiver'S Final Report And Accounting; 2) Approving Final Compensation And Reimbursement Of Costs For Receiver; 3) Exonerating All Bonds; 4) Approving And Ratifying All Of Receiver'S Acts And Transactions; 5) Retaining Jurisdiction Re This Receivership; Hearing required on Plaintiff's Motion for Order: (1) Approving and Settling Receiver's Final Report and Accounting; (2) Approving Final Compensation and Reimbursement of Costs for Receiver; (3) Exonerating All Bonds; (4) Approving and Ratifying All of Receiver's Acts and Transactions; and, (5) Retaining Jurisdiction Regarding the Receivership. Counsel should be prepared to explain reasons for Receiver's actions. = (501/JAR)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS HERNANDEZ VS. GEORGINA MUNOZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 24, 2014, line 10. DEFENDANT GEORGINA MUNOZ's Motion For Attorneys Fees Hearing required on Defendant Munoz's Motion for Attorney Fees Against Plaintiffs Carlos Hernandez and Enrico Hernandez. Plaintiff's attorney to provide in a declaration under penalty the hours spent working on the case in the same categories Ms. Conway has provided those hours. Plaintiff's attorney is to have available for possible review by the Court her billing statements. Court is concerned as to the amount of time spent by defense counsel. = (501/JAR)
